drifts.description: R5 (5.0.0) adds a new triggeredBy backbone element for linking triggering observations; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds instantiates[x] (canonical or Reference) for linking to ObservationDefinition; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds Attachment as an allowed type for value[x]; R4 does not support Attachment in value[x]
R5 (5.0.0) adds bodyStructure as a Reference(BodyStructure) alongside bodySite CodeableConcept; R4 only has bodySite
R5 (5.0.0) expands subject reference types to include BiologicallyDerivedProduct, NutritionProduct, and Substance; R4 allows Patient, Group, Device, Location
R5 (5.0.0) ObservationStatus value set is updated with clarified definitions; same codes but different canonical version
R5 (5.0.0) adds Attachment as an allowed type for component.value[x]; R4 does not support Attachment in component.value[x]
